name: Deferred - Old Enemy - 2
description: Second returns for old enemies from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [social -1] The enemy from {origin} finally did you a public injury and enjoyed the neatness of it.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [money -40] An old enemy from {origin} cost you money by forcing haste, loss, or apology.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] The feud born in {origin} did not ruin you, but it left your name easier to doubt.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [body] The old enmity from {origin} finally marked your body instead of only your prospects.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [social -1] Your enemy from {origin} found a polite way to make others think less of you.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] The old rival from {origin} dragged you into trouble and escaped most of the blame.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [social 1] The enemy first made in {origin} overreached so badly that your restraint began to look like virtue.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [money -20] An old score from {origin} was settled in inconvenience, delay, and one expense you could not avoid.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [body] The hatred born in {origin} stopped being abstract when steel, fist, or accident finally carried it farther.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] You outlasted the enemy from {origin}, which is one of the duller but surer forms of victory.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [social -1] Someone from {origin} finally found the moment to speak against you where it mattered.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [money -30] The old quarrel from {origin} cost you an opportunity that would have been yours in a quieter life.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [social 1] The enmity from {origin} ended when your adversary made themselves ridiculous before useful witnesses.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] An enemy from {origin} did what they could, and what they could was enough to be remembered but not obeyed.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [body] The old conflict from {origin} left its last argument on your body and then finally went quiet.
results.name: old-enemy-2

results.description: [social 1] The enemy you made in {origin} failed against you so publicly that the victory improved your standing.
results.name: old-enemy-2
